name: My work injury symptoms started weeks later—what do I do in Salt Lake?
description: Report now—latent ok if linked to work.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: My work injury symptoms started weeks later—what do I do in Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report now—latent ok if linked to work.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Still report immediately upon realization; latent injuries like repetitive stress covered if work-related.[1][2] 180-day Utah window from incident or discovery.[1] Key factors: Medical opinion linking delay to work; don't wait. Practical guidance: See doctor ASAP, document timeline; insurers scrutinize delays. Strong nexus evidence key for approval.
